recommendedStack.nextClient: Ratatui TUI after core parity tests
recommendedStack.laterClient: Tauri v2 GUI over the same headless core

decisionRationale.productRisk: local configuration mutation, rollback, migration, ownership, and concurrent-host correctness dominate UI iteration speed
decisionRationale.localToolchain: rustc 1.93.1 and cargo 1.93.1 are present; Go is not currently installed
decisionRationale.ecosystemEvidence: the strongest adjacent multi-Agent manager reviewed uses the Rust and Tauri family
decisionRationale.prototypeDecision: do not build duplicate Rust and Go prototypes unless the owner rejects the direct Rust recommendation or delivery evidence later shows unacceptable friction

verticalSlice.name: disposable-root-transaction-closure
verticalSlice.goal: prove one ownership-aware plan, backup, apply, verify, journal, rollback, and recovery loop without touching a real Agent home
domainModels: foreign, observed, and manager-owned ownership states
safetyInvariants: every root contains a generated disposable-test marker and resolves outside real user and project configuration roots
foreign or unknown ownership freezes overwrite
apply requires a persisted plan, unchanged precondition digests, target lock, backup, and journal
verification failure triggers a bounded rollback attempt and records both outcomes
canonical JSON is the client contract; no client bypasses the core
no network, account, telemetry, Hook mutation, package installation, or real Agent home write
acceptanceTests: successful apply and verify can be rolled back byte-for-byte
injected failures before backup, after backup, during replace, and before verification leave recoverable journal states
two transactions targeting the same root cannot apply concurrently
CLI and direct library calls return equivalent decisions and receipts
Windows path, reparse-point, case-folding, and locked-file fixtures fail closed

explicitlyDeferred: real Codex, Claude, CC Switch, or other Agent home adapters
Skill discovery, installation, update, or removal
MCP, Plugin, App, Hook, and external-service management
network updates, accounts, telemetry, publishing, signing, and auto-update
nextGate: foundation slice passes its acceptance suite before any real Agent adapter or configuration write is proposed
